title: Sealing a proof
purpose: Show the write path: live data → canonical bundle → on-chain anchor → Walrus blob.

steps.label: Gather
steps.detail: Tatum Sui RPC + Exchange-Rate build an integrity-checked report (canonical-SUI only; impersonators flagged)

steps.label: Bundle
steps.detail: Canonical JSON {report + AI verdict + Troof Score}

steps.label: Anchor
steps.detail: troof_anchor::anchor(contentHash, subject) → Record on Sui (signed by server keypair, submitted via Tatum RPC)

steps.label: Store
steps.detail: PUT bundle (+ anchor ref) to Walrus → blobId

annotations: Callout on step 3: 'the same SHA-256 is anchored on Sui AND re-checked in the browser'.
Note: blobId is content-addressed, so the URL can't point at swapped bytes.
